headline: Simon Property Group (SPG) Leaves Russell Value Indexes For Defensive Benchmarks
summary: Simon Property Group (NYSE:SPG) has been removed from several Russell value-focused indexes. At the same time, the stock has been added to the Russell 1000 Defensive and Russell 1000 Growth-Defensive indexes. These changes took effect in late June 2026 and shift how the stock is classified in key benchmarks. For investors tracking Simon Property Group, the index reshuffle comes at a time when the stock trades around $226.06 and has shown strong medium and longer term performance. NYSE:SPG...
